race.comment: COSMIC ORDER (5) collected her maiden win two back over this trip at Hawkesbury then tackled a Class 1 over that same course and distance last time but was a little disappointing in the closing stages. Lightly raced and can bounce back in this suitable contest. MELANITE (1) closed well to be beaten under a length when fresh from a spell over 1000m at Hawkesbury last time out, finishing ahead of COSMIC ORDER. Placed at all three runs over 1000m so despite again shouldering 61kgs he looks a major player. The speedy AETERNUM (3) looked home at Wyong recently but was nailed on the line in a 1000m BM64. Has been gelded since that run and should be at peak fitness third-up. VITTOZZI (7) started favourite but was safely held first-up at Hawkesbury last start. Deserves another chance. EXPIDO (2) last appeared when down the track as warm favourite at Scone in December. Has a lot more to offer - let the betting tell the story.
